name: computer_control
description: Control any macOS application using the Accessibility API. Navigate UI trees, click elements, type text, take screenshots, read content, scroll, and more. Works with any app that supports macOS accessibility — Finder, System Settings, Notes, Xcode, and beyond.
title: Computer Control
author: EnconvoAI

onAppStarted.command: test -f assets/accessibility-helper || (cd swift-helper && swiftc -O -o ../assets/accessibility-helper AccessibilityHelper.swift -framework ApplicationServices -framework AppKit -framework CoreGraphics 2>/dev/null)
